fields.ldapPortalUserLdapAuth: Use LDAP Authentication for Portal Users
fields.streamEmailNotifications: Varsling når strømmen til interne brukere oppdateres
fields.portalStreamEmailNotifications: Varsling når strømmen til portalbrukere oppdateres
fields.streamEmailNotificationsEntityList: Epostvarslenes omfang ved endring i strøm
fields.streamEmailWithContentEntityTypeList: Entities with email body in stream notes
fields.massEmailMaxPerHourCount: Maks antall eposter sendt pr time
fields.massEmailMaxPerBatchCount: Max number of emails sent per batch
fields.personalEmailMaxPortionSize: Maks antall eposter som kan hentes inn fra tidligere dato for personlig konto
fields.inboundEmailMaxPortionSize: Maks antall eposter som kan hentes inn fra tidligere dato for gruppekonto
fields.emailScheduledBatchCount: Max number of scheduled emails sent per batch
fields.newNotificationCountInTitle: Display new notification number in page title
fields.mentionEmailNotifications: Send epostvarsler når man nevnes i en post
fields.adminNotificationsNewVersion: Show notification when new EspoCRM version is available
fields.adminNotificationsNewExtensionVersion: Show notification when new versions of extensions are available
fields.textFilterUseContainsForVarchar: Use 'contains' operator when filtering varchar fields
fields.emailAddressIsOptedOutByDefault: Marker nye E-post addresser som avmeldt
fields.passwordRecoveryForAdminDisabled: Disable password recovery for admin users
fields.passwordRecoveryForInternalUsersDisabled: Disable password recovery for internal users
fields.passwordRecoveryNoExposure: Prevent email address exposure on password recovery form
fields.passwordStrengthLetterCount: Antall Bokastaver som kreves i passordet.
fields.passwordStrengthNumberCount: Antall Tall som kreves i passordet.
fields.passwordStrengthBothCases: Passordet må inneholde store og små bokstaver
fields.passwordStrengthSpecialCharacterCount: Number of special character required in password
fields.auth2FAForced: Force regular users to set up 2FA
fields.oidcJwksEndpoint: OIDC JSON Web Key Set Endpoint
fields.oidcAllowRegularUserFallback: OIDC Allow fallback login for regular users
fields.oidcAllowAdminUser: OIDC Allow OIDC login for admin users

tooltips.authIpAddressCheckExcludedUsers: Users that will be able to log in regardless whether their IP address is in the whitelist.
tooltips.authIpAddressWhitelist:
A list of IP addresses or ranges in CIDR notation.

Portals are not affected by restriction.
tooltips.workingTimeCalendar: A working time calendar that will be applied to all users by default.
tooltips.displayListViewRecordCount: A total number of records will be shown on the list view.
tooltips.currencyList: Hvilke valuta til være tiljengelig i systemet.
tooltips.activitiesEntityList: What records will be available in the Activities panel.
tooltips.historyEntityList: What records will be available in the History panel.
tooltips.calendarEntityList: What records will be available in the Calendar.
tooltips.exportDisabled: Users won't be able to export records. Only admin will be allowed.
tooltips.globalSearchEntityList: What records can be searched with Global Search.
tooltips.siteUrl: A URL of this EspoCRM instance. You need to change it if you move to another domain.
tooltips.useCache: Ikke anbefalt å deaktivere, med mindre det er for utvikling årsaker.
tooltips.useWebSocket: WebSocket enables two-way interactive communication between a server and a browser. Requires setting up the WebSocket daemon on your server. Check the documentation for more info.
tooltips.passwordRecoveryForInternalUsersDisabled: Kun portalbrukere vil kunne gjennoprette passordet.
tooltips.passwordRecoveryNoExposure: It won't be possible to determine whether a specific email address is registered in the system.
tooltips.emailAddressSelectEntityTypeList: Entity types available when searching for an email address from a modal.
tooltips.emailNotificationsDelay: A message can be edited within the specified timeframe before the notification is sent.
tooltips.outboundEmailFromAddress: System emails will be sent from this email address. A [group email account](#InboundEmail) with the same email address must be set up and properly configured to send emails.
tooltips.busyRangesEntityList: What will be taken into account when showing busy time ranges in scheduler & timeline.
tooltips.massEmailVerp: Variable envelope return path. For better handling of bounced messages. Make sure that your SMTP provider supports it.
tooltips.recordsPerPage: Antall oppføringer som vises i listevisning fra starten.
tooltips.recordsPerPageSmall: Antall oppføringer som vises i relasjonspanel fra starten.
tooltips.recordsPerPageSelect: Number of records initially displayed when selecting records.
tooltips.recordsPerPageKanban: Number of records initially displayed in kanban columns.
tooltips.outboundEmailIsShared: Tillat brukere å sende eposter via denne SMTP-tjeneren.
tooltips.followCreatedEntities: Brukere vil automatisk følge oppføringer de selv oppretter.
tooltips.emailMessageMaxSize: Alle inngående eposter som overskrider en spesifisert størrelse vil bli hentet uten brødtekst og vedlegg.
tooltips.authTokenLifetime:
Definerer hvor lenge tokens kan eksistere
0 – betyr ingen utløpstid.
tooltips.authTokenMaxIdleTime:
Definerer hvor lenge det siste tilgangstokenet er gyldig.
0 = ingen utløpstid.
tooltips.userThemesDisabled: Brukere vil ikke kunne velge andre stiltema enn det forvalgte.
tooltips.ldapUsername: Hele systemet bruker DN, som tillater å søke etter andre brukere. F.eks: "CN=LDAP System User,CN=tester,OU=espocrm,DC=test,DC=lan".
tooltips.ldapPassword: Passordet som gir tilgang til LDAP-tjeneren.
tooltips.ldapUserNameAttribute: Egenskapen som identifiserer brukeren. F.eks: "userPrincipalName" eller "sAMAccountName" for Active Directory, "uid" for OpenLDAP.
tooltips.ldapUserObjectClass: ObjectClass-egenskapen for å søke blant brukere, f.eks: "person" for AD, "inetOrgPerson" for OpenLDAP.
tooltips.ldapAccountCanonicalForm:
The type of your account canonical form. There are 4 options:

- 'Dn' - the form in the format 'CN=tester,OU=espocrm,DC=test, DC=lan'.

- 'Username' - the form 'tester'.

- 'Backslash' - the form 'COMPANY\tester'.

- 'Principal' - the form 'tester@company.com'.
tooltips.ldapBindRequiresDn: Muligheten til å formatere brukernavnet i DN-format.
tooltips.ldapBaseDn: Forvalgt DN-base brukt for å søke blant brukere. F.eks: "OU=users,OU=espocrm,DC=test, DC=lan".
tooltips.ldapTryUsernameSplit: Dette valget splitter et brukernavn fra domenet.
tooltips.ldapOptReferrals: Om referanser må følges til LDAP-klienten.
tooltips.ldapPortalUserLdapAuth: Allow portal users to use LDAP authentication instead of Espo authentication.
tooltips.ldapCreateEspoUser: Dette valget tillater EspoCRM å opprette en bruker fra LDAP-tjeneren.
tooltips.ldapUserFirstNameAttribute: LDAP-egenskap som brukes for å avgjøre brukeres fornavn, f.eks: "givenname".
tooltips.ldapUserLastNameAttribute: LDAP-egenskap som brukes for å avgjøre brukeres etternavn, f.eks: "sn".
tooltips.ldapUserTitleAttribute: LDAP-egenskap som brukes for å avgjøre brukeres tittel, f.eks: "title".
tooltips.ldapUserEmailAddressAttribute: LDAP-egenskap som brukes for å avgjøre brukeres epostadresse, f.eks: "mail".
tooltips.ldapUserPhoneNumberAttribute: LDAP-egenskap som brukes for å avgjøre brukeres telefonnummer, f.eks: "telephoneNumber".
tooltips.ldapUserLoginFilter: Filteret som avgjør hvilke brukere som får tilgang til EspoCRM, f.eks "memberOf=CN=espoGroup, OU=groups,OU=espocrm, DC=test,DC=lan".
tooltips.ldapAccountDomainName: Domenet som brukes for autentisering av LDAP-tjeneren.
tooltips.ldapAccountDomainNameShort: Det korte domenet som brukes for autentisering av LDAP-tjeneren.
tooltips.ldapUserTeams: Grupper for opprettet bruker. Gå til brukerens profil for å se mer.
tooltips.ldapUserDefaultTeam: Forvalgt gruppe for opprettet bruker. Gå til brukerens profil for å se mer.
tooltips.ldapPortalUserRoles: Forvalgte Roller for en ny Portalbruker
tooltips.b2cMode: EspoCRM er tilpasset B2B som forvalg. Du kan bytte til B2C.
tooltips.currencyDecimalPlaces: Antal decimal tall. Ved tomt felt vil alle ikke-tomme decimalplasser vises.
tooltips.aclStrictMode:
Enabled: Access to scopes will be forbidden if it's not specified in roles.

Disabled: Access to scopes will be allowed if it's not specified in roles.
tooltips.aclAllowDeleteCreated: Users will be able to remove records they created even if they don't have a delete access.
tooltips.textFilterUseContainsForVarchar: If not checked then 'starts with' operator is used. You can use the wildcard '%'.
tooltips.streamEmailNotificationsEntityList: Email notifications about stream updates of followed records. Users will receive email notifications only for specified entity types.
tooltips.authTokenPreventConcurrent: Users won't be able to be logged in on multiple devices simultaneously.
tooltips.emailAddressIsOptedOutByDefault: When creating new record email address will be marked as opted-out.
tooltips.cleanupDeletedRecords: Removed records will be deleted from database after a while.
tooltips.jobRunInParallel: Jobs will be executed in parallel processes.
tooltips.jobPoolConcurrencyNumber: Max number of processes run simultaneously.
tooltips.jobMaxPortion: Max number of jobs processed per one execution.
tooltips.jobForceUtc: Use the UTC time zone for scheduled jobs. Otherwise, the time zone set in settings will be used.
tooltips.daemonInterval: Interval between process cron runs in seconds.
tooltips.daemonMaxProcessNumber: Max number of cron processes run simultaneously.
tooltips.daemonProcessTimeout: Max execution time (in seconds) allocated for a single cron process.
tooltips.maintenanceMode: Kun administratorer vil ha tilgang til systemet.
tooltips.oidcGroupClaim: A claim to use for team mapping.
tooltips.oidcCreateUser: Create a new user in Espo when no matching user found.
tooltips.oidcUsernameClaim: A claim to use for a username (for user matching and creation).
tooltips.oidcTeams: Espo teams mapped against groups/teams/roles of the identity provider. Teams with an empty mapping value will be always assigned to a user (when creating or syncing).
tooltips.oidcLogoutUrl:
An URL the browser will redirect to after logging out from Espo. Intended for clearing the session information in the browser and doing logging out on the provider side. Usually the URL contains a redirect-URL parameter, to return back to Espo.

Available placeholders:
* `{siteUrl}`
* `{clientId}`
tooltips.quickSearchFullTextAppendWildcard: Append a wildcard to an autocomplete search query when Full-Text search is enabled. Reduces search performance.
tooltips.baselineRole:
The default role applied to all users. Any additional roles assigned to a user grant permissions on top of this baseline.

**Important**. Changing this role affects all users – review the change carefully to avoid granting unintended permissions.

messages.confirmBaselineRoleChange: Are you sure you want to change the baseline role? An unconsidered change may grant unintended permissions to all users.
